profile.name: Kunal Singh
profile.specialization: Generative AI · LLM Orchestration · Full Stack Web
profile.bio: AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer specializing in Generative AI, LLM integration, and scalable web applications. Graduated with a B.Tech in Computer Science from Gautam Buddha University, with hands-on experience in building automated agentic pipelines.

experience.summary: Automated business workflows and refined conversational AI workflows through prompt optimization and intent validation.
highlights: Automated business workflows with Python, APIs, and Google Sheets, cutting manual reporting effort by 90%.
Analyzed operational datasets and developed KPI reports to generate insights for leadership and process optimization.
Refined conversational AI workflows through prompt optimization, intent validation, and response evaluation, increasing answer accuracy by 25%.
Trained task-specific models on labeled datasets, error diagnostics, and performance benchmarking to strengthen output quality.

experience.summary: Designed and deployed a Generative AI platform with Google Gemini and OpenAI APIs, embedding LLM capabilities into NLP pipelines.
highlights: Designed and deployed a Generative AI platform with Google Gemini and OpenAI APIs, embedding LLM capabilities into enterprise NLP pipelines.
Formulated prompt templates and tuned inference processes to increase LLM output relevance by 30%.
Produced a demo-ready capstone with technical documentation and cross-functional feedback integration.
Conducted data analysis and model fine-tuning with Python and TensorFlow, reducing processing latency by 25% and supporting production-scale deployment.

experience.summary: Constructed a responsive React.js/Tailwind CSS frontend and built scalable Express.js REST APIs with MongoDB.
highlights: Constructed a responsive frontend using React.js and Tailwind CSS, resolving UI/UX bugs and implementing lazy loading to optimize page load times.
Built scalable backend REST APIs with Node.js and Express.js, boosting response time by 40%.
Collaborated in an Agile 7-member team to deploy builds with Vercel and Netlify, maintaining 95% test coverage.
Integrated MongoDB database with schema design and query optimization, handling user records while improving data retrieval efficiency by 35%.

projects.title: StudyMate
projects.subtitle: GenAI Powered Study Assistant
projects.description: A document intelligence application with RAG, semantic search, embeddings, and ChromaDB for contextual PDF summarization and Q&A. Enabled 40% faster document review and reduced review effort by 70%.
projects.challenges: Processing dense, multi-format PDFs introduced noise, high LLM token costs, and slow response times due to unoptimized chunking strategies.
projects.solutions: Built a custom chunking pipeline using LangChain's recursive character text splitter. Cached semantic embeddings in ChromaDB to reduce LLM API roundtrips, and added a context routing mechanism to choose the best retriever.

architectureSteps.title: PDF Ingestion
architectureSteps.description: Parser extracts raw text and elements from document upload.

architectureSteps.title: Semantic Chunking
architectureSteps.description: Recursively chunks document text with dynamic overlap size.

architectureSteps.title: Embedding Generation
architectureSteps.description: Hugging Face embeddings map text chunks into vector coordinates.

architectureSteps.title: ChromaDB Storage
architectureSteps.description: Saves high-dimensional vectors for fast semantic query retrieval.

architectureSteps.title: RAG Context Retrieval
architectureSteps.description: Filters relevant context chunks using cosine similarity.

architectureSteps.title: LLM Orchestration & Guardrails
architectureSteps.description: Injects context and query into Groq/Gemini, validated via LlamaGuard.

projects.title: AlphaCare
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Healthcare Chatbot
projects.description: Real-time healthcare assistant powered by Gemini, Vapi API, Firebase, and TypeScript for symptom screening and voice interaction. Raised voice-based interaction flow by 45% and user engagement by 35%.
projects.challenges: Voice-based screening suffered from high audio latency, transcription errors for complex medical terms, and state synchronization across Gemini and Vapi APIs.
projects.solutions: Optimized speech-to-text configurations, integrated Vapi API for sub-second streaming audio loopback, built a structured fallback state machine in Node.js, and implemented a custom LLM symptom validation layer.

architectureSteps.title: Voice Input (WebRTC/SIP)
architectureSteps.description: Captures user speech audio streaming through browser client.

architectureSteps.title: Speech-To-Text (Vapi API)
architectureSteps.description: Performs low-latency acoustic transcription to text input.

architectureSteps.title: Gemini Orchestrator
architectureSteps.description: Processes user dialogue, performs clinical intent matching and screening.

architectureSteps.title: Firebase State Store
architectureSteps.description: Updates patient session, symptoms log, and screening progress.

architectureSteps.title: Text-To-Speech Output
architectureSteps.description: Synthesizes low-latency natural human-sounding voice response.

projects.title: Notion - Course Selling Application
projects.subtitle: Secure E-Learning Platform
projects.description: Secure course-selling platform with role-based dashboards and admin tools. Enabled 50+ instructors to monetize content and reach students in underserved areas, achieving 98% test success across JWT auth flows.
projects.challenges: Securing role-based course monetization while maintaining fast loading of media assets. Slow API routes due to deep MongoDB population queries.
projects.solutions: Created strict JSON Web Token (JWT) auth middleware, optimized MongoDB aggregate pipelines with indexed search, and integrated lazy loading/assets compression to maximize rendering speeds.

architectureSteps.title: Client Application
architectureSteps.description: React.js client captures student requests and handles global state.

architectureSteps.title: Express.js Router
architectureSteps.description: Routes incoming API calls, validated by JWT security middleware.

architectureSteps.title: Aggregate Controller
architectureSteps.description: Fetches optimized courses data using MongoDB aggregate lookup pipelines.

architectureSteps.title: MongoDB Database
architectureSteps.description: Persists transactional profiles, enrollment records, and course info.

projects.title: Travel Planner
projects.subtitle: Smart Travel Planning App
projects.description: Smart travel planning application for organizing trips and itineraries with interactive user interfaces and full-stack MERN capabilities.
projects.challenges: Consolidating dynamic routes, weather data, and location markers into an unified itinerary structure without rate-limiting frontend performance.
projects.solutions: Utilized a MERN routing layout, implemented backend caching of external API responses to avoid rate limits, and created dynamic state managers for map display update hooks.

architectureSteps.title: Itinerary Builder UI
architectureSteps.description: Accepts travel constraints, duration, and preferences.

architectureSteps.title: API Gateway Cache
architectureSteps.description: Retrieves external travel guides, weather forecasts, cached in memory.

architectureSteps.title: MERN Engine Controller
architectureSteps.description: Generates optimal travel day timelines and maps geolocation coordinates.

architectureSteps.title: MongoDB Store
architectureSteps.description: Stores and links private itineraries for shared user access.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
